creator: kapil@sh3lls.net
text: Please list us under on the page http://www.freebsd.org/commercial/isp.html Sh3lls Limited provides FreeBSD based VPS using the FreeBSD Jail Technology, as well as FreeBSD based unix shell accounts for IRC. Our FreeBSD VPS and IRC shells both are highly DDOS protected and we are in business since 2003.
